news.headline: Israeli forces kill three Palestinians in Gaza, arrest dozens in West Bank
news.summary: Attacks come as Palestinian groups meet mediators from Egypt, Turkiye and Qatar in Cairo to discuss fragile 'ceasefire'.

news.headline: Pope says he has 'no fear' of Trump after scathing criticism
news.summary: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".

news.headline: Hong Kong’s Mirror star Keung To fined HK$2,200 for driving offences
news.summary:
Hong Kong singer Keung To has been fined HK$2,200 (US$280) for careless driving, running a red light, and failing to display a probationary sign on his car while driving.
